import sys
input = sys.stdin.readline

def solve():
    n = int(input())
    a = list(map(int, input().split()))
    
    MAX_VAL = 501
    dp = [set() for _ in range(MAX_VAL)]
    prefix = [set() for _ in range(MAX_VAL + 1)]
    
    for val in a:
        new_xors = set()
        new_xors.add(val)
        for x in prefix[val]:
            new_xors.add(x ^ val)
        added = new_xors - dp[val]
        if added:
            dp[val] |= added
            for v in range(val + 1, MAX_VAL + 1):
                prefix[v] |= added
    
    result = {0}
    for v in range(MAX_VAL):
        result |= dp[v]
    
    result = sorted(result)
    print(len(result))
    print(*result)

solve()
